subcodes.first_line: From the right the Call of God is raised aloft, and from the left the Name of God is witnessed, and before His face the signs of God are manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از یمین ندآء الله مرتفع و از یسار اسم الله مشهود و امام وجه آیات الله ظاهر و
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
